chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-408 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on MA 3616/23 3.For hearing of main case 4.For orders on MA 3617/23 27-11-2023 None present for the applicant. ***** None present for the applicant. No intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 20.06.2023. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non- prosecution a/w listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
